issue_title: Bug: Adding .comment after key = bool in table does not work
issue_text:
Can't use .comment to add a comment to a table entry that is of type bool. all other types work.

When a bool is added to a table, reading the entry back returns a plain bool instead of a TOML item object, so calling `.comment()` raises `AttributeError`.
success_criteria: 补充真实仓库后，需要人工完善成功标准。
